title: DFU - Case Update Needed popup present if Charge Case is on outdated FW
scenario: After updating earbuds via DFU on outdated firmware, the "Case Update Needed" popup should be dismissable and not reappear after app restart, directing users to Poly Lens Desktop for case updates.
steps: Ensure earbuds and charge case are on outdated firmware.
Observe the Home Screen for a 'Case Update Needed' popup.
Verify that the card displays a message directing the user to use Poly Lens Desktop app for case updates.
expected: The popup can be dismissed and should not reappear after restarting the app. The card displays a message directing the user to use Poly Lens Desktop app for case updates.
